overview.name: Atlass (CitiTrader)
overview.description: CitiTrader client trading portal by Atlass Portfolios for NGX market transactions, account management, mandates, and portfolios.

page.name: Login Page
page.purpose: The entry point and authentication page for Atlass Portfolios (CitiTrader). Allows users to log in with their credentials or request a password reset.
page.key_components: CitiTrader - Atlass Portfolios Limited Header, Customer Account Form, Copyright Footer

page.name: Reset Password Page
page.purpose: Allows users to request a password reset by providing their Login ID and their registered email address.
page.key_components: CitiTrader - Atlass Portfolios Limited Header, Reset Password Form, Copyright Footer

page.name: Dashboard
page.purpose: Main dashboard containing several key overview cards including Accounts summary, Portfolio distribution, Orders summary, Trade executions, Watchlist (Favourites), and quick links menu. This is the default home tab.
page.key_components: Accounts Card, Portfolio Card, Orders Card, Executions Card, Favourites Card, Menu Quick Links

page.name: My Reports
page.purpose: Enables generating and running various financial and account reports, including Statement of Account and Contract Notes.

page.name: List Accounts
page.purpose: Displays a grid of all client trading accounts, showing account numbers, holder names, balances, and main account details.

page.name: Certificates
page.purpose: Allows clients to view and track physical or dematerialized stock certificates associated with their accounts.
page.key_components: Symbol, Units, Cert. Date, Cert. No, Cert. A/C No, Status, Sent, Returned, Entered

page.name: Portfolio
page.purpose: Displays the client's current investment holdings, including unit costs, break-even prices, asset costs, current market value, realizable value, and unrealized gain/loss percentage.
page.key_components: Symbol, Description, Ref Price, Unit Cost, Break-Even Price, Asset Cost, Mkt Value, Net Realizable Value, Gain/Loss (%), Units, Held, Bought, Sold, Total / Net

page.name: Withdrawal Request
page.purpose: Opens a modal dialog that enables the user to request funds withdrawal from their trading account, displaying the available balance.

page.name: New Mandate
page.purpose: Page to initiate and submit a new e-mandate registration for direct dividend payments.

page.name: Manage Mandates
page.purpose: Allows clients to search, view, create, or delete active trading mandates.
page.key_components: Symbol, Account No, Side, Qty, Price, Consideration (Value), Date, Private, Status, Message, Order Type, Entered, Exchange, Mkt. Seg.

page.name: Buy Orders
page.purpose: Displays the user's active and historical stock buy orders, including quantity, price, filled status.

page.name: Sell Orders
page.purpose: Displays the user's active and historical stock sell orders, showing quantity, price, filled status, proceeds.

page.name: Import Mandates
page.purpose: Allows clients to view and process imported mandates that are queued for execution.

page.name: Order History
page.purpose: Allows clients to search and view historical orders across sessions, symbols, dates, accounts, and order details.
page.key_components:
Entered
Side
Symbol, Entered, Side, Symbol, Order Type
Price
Qty
Filled
Open
Last Qty
Last Price
Avg Price
Status
Message
Entered By, Order Type, Price, Qty, Filled, Open, Last Qty, Last Price, Avg Price, Status, Message, Entered By, Session, Mkt. Seg., Account No, On/From

page.name: Summary
page.purpose: Displays trade execution summaries aggregated by market segment and transaction side, including volume and value statistics.
page.key_components: Market Segment, Side, Volume, Value, Session, Mkt. Seg., Account No, Symbol, On/From, To

page.name: Details
page.purpose: Displays individual trade execution details, showing execution date, side, account number, volume, price, value, and order creator.
page.key_components: Symbol, Date, Modified, Side, Account No, Qty, (Avg.) Price, Value, Entered By, Session, Mkt. Seg., On/From, To

page.name: Market View
page.purpose: The central trading cockpit of CitiTrader, housing real-time stock lists, bid/offer order books, and live trade streams. This is the main view where all stock market and security listings live, and where detailed order books can be found.
page.key_components: Top Control Bar, Securities Grid Table, Bottom Panels - Market Tab, Bid Order Book Panel, Offer Order Book Panel, Trades Panel

page.name: My Orders Tab View
page.purpose: Displays the logged-in user's pending, executed, or active orders directly within the Market View interface.

page.name: Trades
page.purpose: Provides a tabular view of recent stock market transactions on the NGX exchange, including prices, quantities, and transaction times. NOTE: Real-time streaming of trades is not active on this view, so users must manually click the Refresh button to query the latest executed trades.

page.name: Statistics
page.purpose: Displays summary statistical data of the market for the trading session, featuring a 2x2 grid of key tables: Gainers, Losers, Most Traded by Value, and Most Traded by Volume.
page.key_components: Gainers Table, Losers Table, Most Traded by Value Table, Most Traded by Volume Table

page.name: Manage Watchlist
page.purpose: Allows users to construct, view, and organize custom watchlists of stock tickers. Shows ticker symbols, names, current reference prices, daily high/low price limits, and entry timestamps.

page.name: Price/Volume Chart
page.purpose: Renders interactive price (OHLC) and volume charts for a selected security symbol within a specified month and year.
page.key_components: Chart Filters Bar, Historical OHLC Grid

page.name: Securities
page.purpose: Lists all listed securities on the NGX exchange, including equities and debt instruments, with reference prices, price limits, issue dates, coupon rates, and other profile details.

page.name: Reports
page.purpose: Enables users to run and export specific market reports, such as the Daily Price List & Market Summary, by configuring filters for exchange, segment, symbol, and date.

page.name: News
page.purpose: Displays real-time market and company news. (Note: This page was not accessible in the current session and may be restricted by user role or pending implementation).

page.name: Quick Help
page.purpose: Displays quick help notes, user guides, and reference tips for navigating and executing trades on the CitiTrader platform.

page.name: Service Request
page.purpose: Allows users to submit support tickets, service requests, or transaction inquiries to customer support.

page.name: Disclaimer
page.purpose: Displays the legal disclaimer, liability limitations, data accuracy notices, and terms of service guidelines for using the CitiTrader application.

vector_store_guidance.instruction: The vector store contains an Element Registry formatted as Relational JSON. Use the file_search tool to query it.
When you need to find specific interactive elements (buttons, inputs) or sections for a page, search using the specific page_id.

The registry separates 'page_overview' objects from 'interactive_element' objects. They are relationally linked by 'page_id'. If you retrieve an element, you can assume it belongs to the page specified by its page_id.
